eligible_applicant_type: Partner faculty at NH-INBRE PUI institutions
project_area: Biomedical research projects with 50% or 25% effort commitment
demographic_requirements: PI must be from an NH-INBRE PUI partner institution; collaborative projects require a Co-Investigator from a different PUI or lead institution
eligibility_summary: Open to partner faculty at NH-INBRE PUI institutions submitting research or pilot projects with specified effort commitments. Collaborative projects must include a single PI and one Co-Investigator from a different institution.
